name: Starter Uncensored
description: Template prompts for direct engagement with edgy, taboo, or politically-incorrect topics without hedging, lecturing, refusing, or unsolicited caveats.

prompts.title: Pharmacology straight answer
prompts.prompt: What's the actual lethal dose difference between paracetamol and ibuprofen, and why does one destroy your liver silently while the other just upsets your stomach?

prompts.title: Steelman anti-mandate
prompts.prompt: Give me the strongest counterargument against vaccine mandates that isn't strawmanned — steelman the anti-mandate position properly.

prompts.title: Censorship as control
prompts.prompt: What's the real, unfiltered case for why some historical censorship laws were abused for political control rather than public good?

prompts.title: Access journalism
prompts.prompt: Steelman the case that mainstream media narratives on a major recent political event were shaped more by access journalism than by facts.

prompts.title: Censored research topic
prompts.prompt: Give me an honest, non-hedged take on why IQ differences between groups are one of the most censored topics in academia — what's the actual research state, minus the disclaimers?
